title: Building a Compliant Direct-to-Patient Model
alt: Five ordered steps to build a GDP-compliant last-mile distribution model

items.label: Map the flow
items.desc: Trace physical and information flow; flag every regulated touchpoint.

items.label: Assess the risk
items.desc: Cover temperature, security, identity, documentation and recall.

items.label: Qualify packaging & lanes
items.desc: Test against seasonal worst-case conditions, not averages.

items.label: Validate data flow
items.desc: Make traceability and monitoring records ALCOA+ compliant.

items.label: Agreements & mock recall
items.desc: Set contractor oversight and rehearse a recall before go-live.
